---
title: "The Ven. Richard Hurrell Froude"
---

## The Ven. Richard Hurrell Froude

**Dates:** (1771-1859)

### Description

Rector of Dartington and Archdeacon of Totnes

### Biography

[ODNB ]

### Letters

- Letter from February 23, 1853
- Letter from Sept 19th  [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
